jobs.prompt: Isolated on a pure plain solid white background, no text, no words, centered, clean crisp edges. A glossy bright red love heart with a small crack line across the top. Behind the heart, crossed in a clean X: a black AR-15 rifle on one side and a wooden over-and-under sport clay-shooting shotgun on the other side. Clean bold sticker style, vibrant, simple, precise, no watermark.
